utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. (2) financing: includes financing solution with terms — yes (mortgage amount, interest rate, term, monthly payment, amortization, down payment, fee, broker). (3) legal_services: includes legal services with costs — yes (firm, lawyer, services, cost, timeline). (4) moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs — yes (company, services, cost, scheduled). (5) setup_services: utility and setup services — yes (provider, services, cost, installation date). (6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown — yes (purchase price, down payment, mortgage amount, closing costs, legal fees, moving, utilities, arrangement fee, totals, monthly payment). All items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific selections that correspond to items in the ground-truth ratings: a purchase property described as a 140m² 3-bedroom family house with double garage in a good school district and near craft breweries aligns with 'Family House'.
